address.address1: Wisma Meurah Muliah, Jalan Pasar Lamyong, Lamgugob, Syiah Kuala, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Sumatera, Indonesia

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.1/10 on value for money

nearbyPlaces.name: RF Dental Clinic& Lab -1 praktek dokter Gigi

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Dear Fardilawati,

Terima kasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk membagikan ulasan Anda kepada kami.

Kami sangat senang mengetahui bahwa pengalaman Anda selama menginap di Dancenter Meurah Mulia sangat memuaskan. Apresiasi Anda terhadap pelayanan staf kami, kebersihan dan kenyamanan kamar, serta fasilitas yang tersedia merupakan motivasi besar bagi kami untuk terus mempertahankan dan meningkatkan kualitas layanan.

Kami juga senang lokasi hotel kami dapat memberikan kemudahan selama Anda beraktivitas. Masukan dan rekomendasi Anda sangat berarti bagi kami.

Kami berharap dapat kembali menyambut Anda di kesempatan berikutnya.

Warm regards,
Aisha
Dancenter Meurah Mulia
comments.reviewComments: The experience of staying at this hotel was very satisfying. The staff service was friendly and professional, the rooms were clean and comfortable, and the facilities were complete. The location is also strategic, making activities during the stay easier. Overall, this hotel is highly recommended for anyone seeking comfort and the best service. Thank you for the amazing experience.
comments.originalComment:
Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Pelayanan staf ramah dan profesional, kamar bersih serta nyaman, dan fasilitas lengkap. Lokasinya juga strategis sehingga memudahkan aktivitas selama menginap.
Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini sangat direkomendasikan bagi siapa saja yang mencari kenyamanan dan pelayanan terbaik. Terima kasih atas pengalaman yang luar biasa.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Yth. Fardilawati,

Terima kasih banyak atas ulasan luar biasa dan penilaian sempurnanya! Kami sangat senang mendengar bahwa Anda menikmati pengalaman menginap di Dancenter Meurah Mulia, mulai dari pelayanan staf, kebersihan dan kenyamanan kamar, fasilitas hotel, hingga lokasi yang strategis. Masukan positif Anda sangat memotivasi tim kami untuk terus memberikan layanan terbaik dan pengalaman yang tak terlupakan bagi setiap tamu.

Kami sangat menantikan kedatangan Anda kembali di Dancenter Meurah Mulia pada kunjungan berikutnya.

Salam hangat,
Dancenter Meurah Mulia
comments.reviewComments:
I was very impressed with my stay at this hotel. From the moment I arrived, the service provided by the staff was very friendly, professional, and attentive. The check-in process was quick and efficient, making me feel very valued as a guest.  
The room provided was very clean, comfortable, and neatly arranged with complete facilities. The bed was soft, the atmosphere was calm, and the interior design gave a warm and elegant impression. I also really enjoyed the view from the room which added to my comfort during the stay.  
Hotel facilities such as the restaurant, lounge area, and cleaning services all worked very well. The food served was also delicious with a quite varied menu.  
The hotel's location is also very strategic, easily accessible, and close to various public facilities. This certainly helped a lot during my trip.  
Overall, my experience at this hotel was truly amazing and exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for comfort, top-notch service, and a memorable stay.  
Thank you for the outstanding service, I will definitely return on another occasion.
comments.originalComment:
Saya sangat terkesan dengan pengalaman menginap di hotel ini. Sejak pertama datang, pelayanan yang diberikan oleh staf begitu ramah, profesional, dan penuh perhatian. Proses check-in berlangsung cepat dan efisien, membuat saya merasa sangat dihargai sebagai tamu.
Kamar yang disediakan sangat bersih, nyaman, dan tertata rapi dengan fasilitas yang lengkap. Tempat tidurnya empuk, suasananya tenang, serta desain interiornya memberikan kesan hangat dan elegan. Saya juga sangat menikmati pemandangan dari kamar yang menambah kenyamanan selama menginap.
Fasilitas hotel seperti restoran, area santai, dan layanan kebersihan semuanya berjalan dengan sangat baik. Makanan yang disajikan pun lezat dengan variasi menu yang cukup beragam.
Lokasi hotel juga sangat strategis, mudah dijangkau, dan dekat dengan berbagai fasilitas umum. Hal ini tentu sangat membantu selama perjalanan saya.
Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman menginap di hotel ini benar-benar luar biasa dan melebihi ekspektasi saya. Saya sangat merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada siapa pun yang mencari kenyamanan, pelayanan terbaik, dan pengalaman menginap yang berkesan.
Terima kasih atas pelayanan yang luar biasa, saya pasti akan kembali lagi di lain kesempatan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good location, kind staff, clean room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Tidak recomend utk yg punya anak kecil balita ya say. Apa lgi kamar *** amboi buka pintu aura nya langsung wow... Tpi utk harga sgtu klw anak2 muda rame2 boleh lah. Tempat tdur empuk ax juga dingin. Cuma masalah aura aja utk bawa anak gk cocok

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
